nasb.text: And He said to them, “Then render to Caesar the things that are Caesar’s, and to God the things that are God’s.”

esv.text: He said to them, “Then render to Caesar the things that are Caesar’s, and to God the things that are God’s.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“這樣，凱撒的應當歸給凱撒，　神的應當歸給　神。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“属于凯撒的，要给凯撒；属于上帝的，要给上帝。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“因此，凯撒的归给凯撒；神的归给神。”
